items.why: The mobile overlay fetched /api/gm-decision asynchronously after rendering. If the request failed, the app cleared state without repainting; if the week/team/phase changed before the request returned, an older decision could repaint the current mobile deck.

rejected.reason: Rejected because state.mobilePendingDecision and /api/gm-decision already provide the source-of-truth path; a second cache would make observability less honest.
Still blocked on real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying and current live-origin/routing evidence; no fabricated launch evidence used.

gameLoopReview.finding: The mobile loop now protects pressure -> choice -> consequence from stale asynchronous decision state, so a phone user never sees an old General Manager call as the current one.
